title: chore(deps): bump dubbo.apache.org/dubbo-go/v3 from 3.0.3-0.20230118042253-4f159a2b38f3 to 3.3.2-20260419 in /tests/certification
body:
Bumps [dubbo.apache.org/dubbo-go/v3](https://github.com/apache/dubbo-go) from 3.0.3-0.20230118042253-4f159a2b38f3 to 3.3.2-20260419.
Release notes

Sourced from dubbo.apache.org/dubbo-go/v3's releases.

v3.3.2-20260419

What's Changed

  • fix(remoting): Refine Getty server TLS configuration by @​phpcyy in apache/dubbo-go#3156
  • docs: fix broken documentation links in README by @​Tsukikage7 in apache/dubbo-go#3158
  • feat(triple): support generic call for Triple protocol by @​Tsukikage7 in apache/dubbo-go#3154
  • test: enhance triple stream validation in unit tests by @​Similarityoung in apache/dubbo-go#3152
  • fix: polaris router support application name by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3164
  • refactor(triple): upgrade triple client to service-level abstraction by @​Aetherance in apache/dubbo-go#3086
  • refactor: rename ExpectedCodecName to FallbackCodecName internally by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3169
  • feat(generic): support protobuf-json serialization in generic filter by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3170
  • Feat/generic-add-include-class-config by @​Snow-kal in apache/dubbo-go#3171
  • fix(cluster/failback): add exponential backoff for retry mechanism by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3180
  • feat(generic): add InvokeWithType and move GenericService to filter/generic by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3174
  • feat(generic): add bean generalizer to support generic=bean serialization by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3175
  • fix(registry/nacos): add exponential backoff for subscribe retry by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3178
  • fix(protocol/triple): use context-aware dialer in HTTP/2 transport by @​phpcyy in apache/dubbo-go#3165
  • fix(common): Make URL cloning thread-safe by @​phpcyy in apache/dubbo-go#3160
  • feat(generic): add exception class handle by @​Snow-kal in apache/dubbo-go#3183
  • fix(cluster/failback): stabilize flaky tests for exponential backoff by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3187
  • fix(test): stabilize flaky multiplyConditionRoute test by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3192
  • fix: ensure router receives attachments from context by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3185
  • refactor: remove config package dependency from protocol tests by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3194
  • remove the config of config_center by @​nanjiek in apache/dubbo-go#3202
  • refactor: remove config package dependency from health and reflectionservices by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3197
  • feat: support cors for triple by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3090
  • refactor: remove config package dependency from remoting tests by @​Snow-kal in apache/dubbo-go#3198
  • refactor(router): replace config package by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3186
  • test(filter): remove config package dependency from tests by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3209
  • fix(router): ensure invoker receive Provider's tag, fix type bug by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3208
  • feat(router): enable register of script router, remove useless comment by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3215
  • refactor: remove config package from dubbogo-cli sample generator by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3218
  • fix(router): fix wrong config key by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3220
  • fix(router): fix wrong option configuration, add script-related options by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3221
  • fix(protocol): fix panic caused by race condition during invoker destruction by @​HGD-coder in apache/dubbo-go#3184
  • feat(metrics): enhance the monitoring metrics of rpc call failure under Triple protocol by @​Saramanda9988 in apache/dubbo-go#3189
  • Fix typo: occured to occurred by @​04cb in apache/dubbo-go#3227
  • refactor: add more params when calculating the revision. by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3224
  • Remove the config package from server package by @​nanjiek in apache/dubbo-go#3207
  • refactor: remove config package from polaris and config_center by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3210
  • Refactor : remove protocol config by @​Snow-kal in apache/dubbo-go#3212
  • refactor(protocol/triple): remove config package dependency by @​CAICAIIs in apache/dubbo-go#3229
  • fix(router/affinity): prevent panic caused by nil return in initialization phase by @​Aetherance in apache/dubbo-go#3216
  • fix(filter):solve side effects caused by 3184 refactor by @​HGD-coder in apache/dubbo-go#3230
  • fix(router): call BuildRouterChain method when creating directory. by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3225
  • refactor: remove config package dependency from application generator by @​zbchi in apache/dubbo-go#3239
  • fix: release the lock in advance in case causing deadlock by @​yangpixi in apache/dubbo-go#3238
  • feat(probe): add Kubernetes probe support with liveness, readiness, and startup checks by @​Alanxtl in apache/dubbo-go#3213
  • Fix security vulnerabilities reported by Dependabot by @​Alanxtl in apache/dubbo-go#3244
  • remove the config package from package client by @​nanjiek in apache/dubbo-go#3232
  • fix(router): use ApplicationKey instead of Tagkey to build config key in Route method by @​Aetherance in apache/dubbo-go#3251

... (truncated)

Changelog

Sourced from dubbo.apache.org/dubbo-go/v3's changelog.

3.3.1

Summary

This release introduces major enhancements to the Triple protocol, improvements to configuration and registry centers (Nacos, Apollo, Zookeeper), and extensive refactoring of core modules to improve stability and performance. This version also updates compatibility to Go 1.24.

New Features

  • Support group and version wildcards for exact interface matching. #3080
  • Support injecting dubbo.tag into service metadata. #3069
  • Expose Router-related APIs. #3066
  • Update Go version support to Go 1.24 and remove deprecated rand.seed usage. #3046
  • Introduce an imports formatter tool and integrate it into CI checks. #3019
  • Add configuration hot-reloading capability. #2992
  • Support running HTTP/2 and HTTP/3 servers simultaneously. #2972
  • Add WithInterface option for client initialization. #2946
  • Add tooling support to generate OpenAPI documentation for Triple services. #2951
  • Add experimental HTTP/3 support for the Triple protocol. #2916
  • Redesign TLS APIs and add new TLS configuration for Triple protocol. #2852 #2891
  • Support Non-IDL mode in the new Triple implementation. #2858
  • Add support for Apollo as a configuration center. #2857
  • Support decoding Hessian from stream to improve performance for large packet transmission. #2841
  • Add generic call support for the new Triple protocol. #2818

Bug Fixes

  • Fix Nacos deregistration failure during shutdown. #3108
  • Prevent panic when retrieving metadata from Java providers. #3092
  • Adjust log level from Error to Warn when application parameters are empty in Tag Router. #3035
  • Fix nil pointer dereference in multiple modules. #3071
  • Resolve URL parameter loss in SetParams method. #3022
  • Handle cluster extension creation failures instead of panicking. #3021 #3064
  • Fix incorrect log rotation paths to prevent file loss. #3014
  • Correct counter decrement logic on error. #3013
  • Fix metadata retrieval failures caused by meta-v errors and empty remote storage parameters. #2952 #2953
  • Fix provider configuration loading in dubbo.Load(). #2941
  • Fix attachment passing issues from server to client in Triple protocol. #2928 #2854
  • Fix Nacos weight configuration not taking effect. #2937
  • Reduce latency in Zookeeper client node perception. #2930
  • Fix read prefix EOF errors in the communication layer. #2912
  • Fix Nacos instance overwrite issues. #2882
  • Resolve logical infinite loop issues. #2879
  • Fix Nacos subscription issues where newly registered services were not detected. #2859
  • Fix Nacos weight option configuration logic. #2843
  • Fix error propagation in marshalRequest. #2817
  • Fix Context Attachment error handling in Triple streaming calls. #2810

Code Enhancements

  • Refactor: Config Decoupling. Decoupled dependencies from config package to resolve circular dependencies across registry, filter, and TLS modules.

... (truncated)

Commits
  • See full diff in compare view

> **Note** > Automatic rebases have been disabled on this pull request as it has been open for over 30 days.
